data.name: Mainlbl1.BaseStylesheet
data.value: #bunifu-label { padding: 0px; font-family: 'Montserrat'; font-size: 9.749999pt; width: 100%; height: 100%; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: left; }

data.name: bunifuLabel1.BaseStylesheet
data.value: #bunifu-label { padding: 0px; font-family: 'Arial'; font-size: 12pt; width: 100%; height: 100%; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(64, 64, 64); text-align: left; }

data.name: Mainlbl.BaseStylesheet
data.value: #bunifu-label { padding: 0px; font-family: 'Montserrat'; font-size: 12pt; width: 100%; height: 100%; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: left; }

data.name: bunifuLabel2.BaseStylesheet
data.value: #bunifu-label { padding: 0px; font-family: 'Catamaran'; font-size: 15.75pt; width: 100%; height: 100%; font-style: normal; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(105, 105, 105); text-align: left; }
